sections.paragraph:
to draw over, to cover (Syr. and Chald. to overlay with metal), followed by עַל like other verbs of covering, Eze 37:6 קָרַמְתִּי עֲלֵיכֶם עֹור, “I will draw skin over you.” Intrans. to be drawn over, fut. יִקְרַם, Eze 37:8.

[“קָרַן pr. to push with the horn, apparently; whence קֶרֶן.”]
